security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Vexel-style photo mosaics in any shape
bundle.longDescription: Pack photos into a heart or any vector shape. Faces auto-detected and framed. Everything runs locally.
